title: クレーンゲーム大成功！

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Wow, you got so many! I'm sure the claw machine
is happy you had fun as well!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right. I said I'd give you a reward if you
got a lot, didn't I?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I apologize. I said it on a whim, but I didn't give
any thought as to what it would be...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
What would be appropriate? I've seen game
shows give away TVs, audio equipment, cars, or
even a yacht...
choice_data_list: I want you to win a race!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: I see! In that case, I'll win for sure!
